base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of unused_sprite — a pickup_item from 1986 castlevania. 'Unused' label — item-shaped sprite present in ROM but not placed in retail stages. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'Unused' label — item-shaped sprite present in ROM but not placed in retail stages
